assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Red Hat account, activate the Developer Sandbox, and deploy and open a first application.

first_success.outcome: OpenShift deploys the learning-path application and exposes it through a route.
first_success.observable_signal: The application route opens successfully in the browser.

route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.

candidates.name: Developer Sandbox learning path
candidates.reason: The Developer Sandbox provides a hosted OpenShift cluster and guided browser path without a local cluster installation.

candidates.name: Local OpenShift installation
candidates.reason: It requires local virtualization and more resources; Developer Sandbox is the hosted first-success route.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Red Hat developer account.
required_path.observable_result: The developer portal session is active.

required_path.action: Activate or launch the OpenShift Developer Sandbox.
Follow the learning path to create a project and deploy the sample application.
Wait for the workload to become ready and expose its route.
Open the route from the topology or project view.

prerequisites.description: A Red Hat account eligible for Developer Sandbox.
Any identity or phone verification required to activate the sandbox.
Developer Sandbox capacity must be available.

external_gates.description: Sandbox activation may require identity or phone verification.
Sandbox access depends on current eligibility and capacity.

unavoidable_waits.description: The workload must deploy before its route responds.

platform_outcomes.description: OpenShift deploys the learning-path application and exposes it through a route.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

sources.title: Get started with your Developer Sandbox

uncertainties.question: Sandbox eligibility, capacity, and verification requirements can vary by geography and account history.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
